bugsFixes.description: Per-tab color now changes on desktop — JS reads data-tab-color from wrapper and applies color class alongside bg-accent-lighter
evidence: tabs-per-tab-colors-default-1440w.png - Default tab shows page accent color
tabs-per-tab-colors-blue-1440w.png - Blue tab shows blue background on wrapper
tabs-per-tab-colors-orange-1440w.png - Orange tab shows orange background on wrapper
tabs-per-tab-colors-purple-1440w.png - Purple tab shows purple background on wrapper
bugsFixes.technicalVerification: Page audit confirms data-tab-color attributes present on wrappers. JS in Tabs.js lines 90-110 correctly reads wrapper.dataset.tabColor and applies color class to active wrapper.

bugsFixes.description: Mobile border now persists on open — added open:border alongside open:border-accent on details element
evidence: tabs-mobile-border-open-375w.png - Mobile accordion shows border when open
bugsFixes.technicalVerification: TabsItem.php line 22 contains 'open:bg-accent open:border open:border-accent' which includes the border utility. Border is visible around open accordion items on mobile.

focusAreas: Per-tab colors on desktop (1440px) - clicking through Default, Blue, Orange, Purple tabs
Default color tabs in Overview/Services sections
Mobile border visibility at 375px when accordion is open
Tab switching ensures no stale color classes remain
Sticky behavior still works on desktop

build.details: Build completed successfully with 3 webpack performance warnings (bundle size). No TypeScript errors.

lint.details: Minor warning in Tabs.tsx line 94: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies. This is existing technical debt, not introduced by this revision.

issues.description: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'attributes.tabsColor', 'attributes.tabsDescription', 'attributes.tabsHeading', 'innerBlocksLength', and 'setAttributes'

registration.details: 9 takt/tabs block instances found on test page. Block registration verified.

attributes.details: tabsColor attribute correctly synced from child tabColor values. Data attributes present in rendered HTML.

edgeCases.details: Test page includes comprehensive edge cases: single tab, 8 tabs, long content, empty optional fields, per-tab colors, all tabs with descriptions.

testsRun.test: Per-tab color switching - Default Color tab
testsRun.details: First tab (no tabColor set) uses page accent color. Wrapper has bg-accent-lighter but no color class.
Clicking Blue tab applies 'blue' class to wrapper. Background color changes to blue-lighter variant. No stale color classes from previous tab.
Clicking Orange tab removes blue class and applies 'orange' class. Background transitions to orange-lighter.
Clicking Purple tab removes orange class and applies 'purple' class. Background transitions to purple-lighter.
Overview section (no tabColor set) uses default accent-lighter background. No color class applied to wrapper.
Accordion item at 375px viewport shows border around open item. open:border utility is present and working.
Pressing ArrowDown from first tab moves focus and selection to second tab. Second tab panel becomes visible.
Tablist remains sticky when scrolling through tall tab content. Position sticky with top offset working correctly.

accessibility.details: ARIA attributes correctly implemented. Tablist has aria-label, tab buttons have aria-controls linking to panel IDs.

checks.evidence: Tabs.php line 32 sets aria-label using heading or 'Tabs' fallback
Tabs.php line 52 sets aria-controls referencing panel ID in server-rendered HTML
Tabs.php line 53 sets aria-selected='true' for first tab, 'false' for others

checks.check: Tab panels have role=tabpanel and aria-labelledby
checks.evidence: TabsItem.php line 41 sets id, role='tabpanel', aria-labelledby, and tabindex='0' on content div
Tabs.js lines 134-142 implement vertical arrow key navigation with wrapping
Tabs.js lines 143-150 implement Home/End jump to first/last tab
TabsItem.php renders <details><summary> for native disclosure behavior on mobile

markupDuplication.details: No responsive duplication detected. Single <details> element serves both desktop and mobile with CSS visibility control.

tsxPhpSync.details: TSX and PHP structure match. Both apply color class to wrapper and details element. Conditional classes synchronized.
tsxPhpSync.notes: TabsItem.php lines 2-5 correctly use auto-extracted variables with null coalescing. No manual $attributes[] assignments found.

innerBlocks.details: Inner blocks (takt/tabs-item) render correctly. Content displays in panels. Template structure verified.

specCompliance.details: Test page variations match planning spec. 9 tab block instances covering all required scenarios including per-tab colors.

issues.description: React Hook useEffect in Tabs.tsx has missing dependencies warning
issues.fix: Add missing dependencies to useEffect dependency array or use useCallback for setAttributes
issues.note: This is existing technical debt from the parent Tabs component, not introduced by the per-tab color feature. Does not affect functionality.

passedChecks: Build compiles without errors
Block registers correctly - 9 instances on test page
Per-tab color attribute saves and loads correctly
Per-tab color changes wrapper background on desktop via JS (Bug Fix #1 verified)
Mobile border persists when accordion is open (Bug Fix #2 verified)
Default color tabs (no tabColor set) use page accent color
Tab switching removes previous color classes correctly
No stale color classes remain on inactive wrappers
Sticky behavior works when scrolling tall content
Keyboard navigation - ArrowDown/ArrowUp moves between tabs
Keyboard navigation - Home/End jumps to first/last tab
Keyboard navigation - Enter/Space activates tab
ARIA attributes present in server-rendered HTML
Tablist has aria-label using heading text
Tab buttons have aria-controls linking to panel IDs
Tab buttons have aria-selected state
Tab panels have role=tabpanel and aria-labelledby
Mobile uses native details/summary for accessibility
JS removes tabpanel roles on mobile to avoid conflict
TSX and PHP structure synchronized
No responsive markup duplication
Edge cases tested: single tab, 8 tabs, long content, per-tab colors
Test page matches planning spec variations

interactiveBehavior.description: Per-Tab Colors section - Default Color tab (inherits page accent)
Per-Tab Colors section - Blue Tab selected, wrapper background is blue-lighter
Per-Tab Colors section - Orange Tab selected, wrapper background is orange-lighter
Per-Tab Colors section - Purple Tab selected, wrapper background is purple-lighter
Mobile view at 375px - Accordion item open with border visible
Keyboard navigation - Second tab selected after pressing ArrowDown
Default color tabs - Overview section using page accent color
Sticky tablist behavior - Tablist remains visible when scrolling content

output.qaVerdict: PASS - Both bug fixes verified and working correctly. Per-tab colors change wrapper background on desktop as expected. Mobile border persists when accordion is open. All keyboard navigation, ARIA attributes, and interactive behavior working as designed. Only minor lint warning (existing technical debt).
